ground_truth.app.py:
"""Main application entry point."""

from models import User, Product, Order
from service import EntityService


def setup_app(db):
    """Initialize the application."""
    service = EntityService(db)
    return service


def create_sample_data(service):
    """Create sample data including checkout flow."""
    user = User("u1", "Alice", "alice@example.com")
    product = Product("p1", "Widget", 9.99)
    service.save(user)
    service.save(product)
    order = Order("o1", "u1", ["p1", "p2"], 29.98)
    service.save(order)
    return user, product, order

test_suite.test_base_entity:
def test_base_entity():
    """BaseEntity class should exist with entity_id."""
    e = BaseEntity("e1")
    assert e.entity_id == "e1"
    assert "entity_id" in e.to_dict()
    return True
test_suite.test_user_inherits_base:
def test_user_inherits_base():
    u = User("u1", "Alice", "alice@example.com")
    assert isinstance(u, BaseEntity)
    d = u.to_dict()
    assert d["name"] == "Alice"
    assert "entity_id" in d
    return True
test_suite.test_order_exists:
def test_order_exists():
    """Order class should exist and work."""
    o = Order("o1", "u1", ["p1"], 9.99)
    d = o.to_dict()
    assert "items" in d
    assert d["total"] == 9.99
    assert "entity_id" in d or "order_id" in d
    return True
test_suite.test_order_inherits_base:
def test_order_inherits_base():
    """Order should inherit from BaseEntity."""
    o = Order("o1", "u1", ["p1"], 9.99)
    assert isinstance(o, BaseEntity)
    d = o.to_dict()
    assert "entity_id" in d or "order_id" in d
    return True
test_suite.test_setup_app:
def test_setup_app():
    class MockDB:
        def insert(self, c, d): pass
        def find(self, c, q): return None
        def find_all(self, c, q): return []
    service = setup_app(MockDB())
    assert service is not None
    return True
